category_sources: source_facts.description says it designs PCR primers; official Primer3 manual documents primer design inputs and behavior.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and manual use Primer3 capitalization.
docs_sources: Official Primer3 manual is hosted on primer3.org and links the source code repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/primer3-org/primer3; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PCR primer design; source_facts.executables lists primer3_core and related command-line tools.
